basic_details.job_title: Tezpur University – Field Assistant, Junior Research Fellow – 5 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tezpur University Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Project Staff. Candidates with M.Sc, B.Sc./Diploma Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Tezpur University official website.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years (Relaxable as per Govt. of India rules)

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. with NET-JRF/NET-LS/GATE for JRF, B.Sc./Diploma for Field Assistant.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: Rs. 37,000/- per month, Field Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tezpur University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Tezpur University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Field Assistant, Junior Research Fellow Posts
